questions.question: Who is Melchizedek described as in this chapter?
options: King of Salem and priest of God Most High
questions.correct: King of Salem and priest of God Most High
questions.feedback: Melchizedek was king of Salem and priest of God Most High.

questions.question: The author argues that the priesthood changed from Levitical to what order?
questions.feedback: A change from the Levitical priesthood to the order of Melchizedek was necessary.

questions.question: Abraham gave a tenth of everything to Melchizedek.
questions.feedback: Abraham gave Melchizedek a tenth of everything.

questions.question: Jesus holds his priesthood permanently because he continues _____.
questions.feedback: Jesus holds his priesthood permanently because he continues forever.

questions.question: Jesus is able to save completely those who come to God through him because he always lives to _____ for them.
questions.feedback: Jesus always lives to intercede for those who come to God through him.
